instructions: Drag the tray from the adjacent table over to this side and lift it.
Pull the breakfast tray across to the target table, then raise it up.
Move the tray from the far table to the near table and lift it.
Slide the tray over to the other table and then pick it up with both hands.
Transfer the breakfast tray from the side table by dragging it over, then lift.
Grab the tray on the adjacent surface, drag it to the target area, and raise it.
Use both hands to pull the tray across to the target table and lift it above the surface.
Reach over, drag the breakfast tray to this side, and lift it clear of the table.
Bring the tray from the neighboring table over here and raise it up.
Slide the breakfast tray across from the other table and lift it with both grippers.
